name: Mattermost
shortDescription: Integrate a self-hosted (or Cloud) [Mattermost](https://mattermost.com/) instance with FlowRunner. Create and manage posts, channels, teams, users, files, and reactions through the Mattermost REST API v4, using a Personal Access Token or bot token.

actions.name: Create Post
actions.description: Creates a new post (message) in a Mattermost channel. Supports threaded replies via the root post ID, custom props (for attachments/metadata), and attaching previously uploaded files by their file IDs. Use Upload File first to obtain file IDs.

actions.name: Get Post
actions.description: Retrieves a single post by its ID, including its message, author, channel, timestamps, and thread metadata.

actions.name: Update Post
actions.description: Updates the message text and/or props of an existing post. This replaces the post content; fields left empty are not changed.

actions.name: Delete Post
actions.description: Soft-deletes a post by its ID. The post is removed from the channel for all users.

actions.name: Get Channel Posts
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of posts for a channel, ordered newest-first. Returns an order array of post IDs plus a keyed posts map. Use page and per-page for pagination.

actions.name: Search Posts
actions.description: Searches posts across a team using Mattermost search terms. Supports modifiers such as "from:", "in:", "before:", and "after:". Set OR search to match any term instead of all terms.

actions.name: Pin Post
actions.description: Pins a post to its channel so it appears in the channel's pinned posts list.

actions.name: Unpin Post
actions.description: Unpins a previously pinned post from its channel.

actions.name: Create Channel
actions.description: Creates a new public or private channel within a team. The name is the URL-safe handle (lowercase, no spaces) and the display name is the human-readable label shown in the UI.

actions.name: Get Channel
actions.description: Retrieves a channel by its ID, including name, display name, type, team, and metadata.

actions.name: Get Channel by Name
actions.description: Retrieves a channel within a team by its URL-safe name (handle) rather than its ID.

actions.name: List Channels for Team
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of public channels for a team. Use page and per-page to iterate through all channels.

actions.name: Delete Channel
actions.description: Archives (soft-deletes) a channel by its ID. The channel is removed from active lists but its history is retained.

actions.name: Add User to Channel
actions.description: Adds a user as a member of a channel.

actions.name: Remove User from Channel
actions.description: Removes a user from a channel's membership.

actions.name: Create Direct Channel
actions.description: Creates (or returns the existing) direct message channel between two users.

actions.name: Create Group Channel
actions.description: Creates (or returns the existing) group message channel among three or more users.

actions.name: List Teams
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of teams on the server that are visible to the authenticated account.

actions.name: Get Team
actions.description: Retrieves a team by its ID, including name, display name, type, and metadata.

actions.name: Get Team by Name
actions.description: Retrieves a team by its URL-safe name (handle) rather than its ID.

actions.name: Get User
actions.description: Retrieves a user by their ID, including username, email, nickname, roles, and profile metadata.

actions.name: Get User by Username
actions.description: Retrieves a user by their username rather than their ID.

actions.name: Get Me
actions.description: Retrieves the profile of the account associated with the configured access token. Useful as a connection check to verify the server URL and token are valid.

actions.name: Search Users
actions.description: Searches for users by a term matched against username, full name, nickname, and (when permitted) email. Optionally scope the search to a specific team.

actions.name: Create User
actions.description: Creates a new user account on the server. Requires the configured token to have user-management permissions. Provide either a password (for a standard account) or rely on the server's auth service.

actions.name: Update User Status
actions.description: Sets the presence status of a user (online, away, offline, or do not disturb).

actions.name: Upload File
actions.description: Uploads a file to a channel and returns its file info, including the file ID. Provide a publicly reachable file URL; the file is downloaded and forwarded to Mattermost as multipart form data. Use the returned file ID in the File IDs parameter of Create Post to attach the file to a message.

actions.name: Get File
actions.description: Downloads a file from Mattermost by its file ID and stores it in FlowRunner file storage, returning a URL to the stored copy for use in later steps.

actions.name: Add Reaction
actions.description: Adds an emoji reaction to a post on behalf of a user. Use the emoji short name without colons (e.g. thumbsup).

actions.name: Remove Reaction
actions.description: Removes an emoji reaction previously added by a user from a post.

idealUseCases: Post automated notifications, alerts, or reports to a Mattermost channel or thread.
Provision channels and manage membership as part of onboarding or project workflows.
Search and archive channel history for auditing or reporting.
Sync files into Mattermost or pull attachments back into FlowRunner file storage.
React to posts or manage user presence status programmatically.
agentIdeas: Use **Mattermost** "Search Posts" to gather a team's discussion on a topic, then **Notion**
When a **Slack** "On Channel Message" trigger fires, cross-post the message with **Mattermost**
After **Google Sheets** "Get Rows" returns a list of stakeholders, call **Mattermost**
